context: Tests whether the agent correctly places UIViewController lifecycle work in the right methods (viewIsAppearing for geometry-dependent scroll, viewDidLoad for setup), follows constraint best practices (activate[], no remove/recreate, identifiers, priority ≤999), and animates layout changes correctly (constant update + layoutIfNeeded on superview).

checklist.name: scrollToItem in viewIsAppearing
checklist.description: The scrollToItem(at:at:animated:) call (or equivalent scroll-to-selected logic) is inside viewIsAppearing(_:), NOT in viewDidLoad or viewWillAppear

checklist.name: Setup in viewDidLoad
checklist.description: Subview creation, addSubview calls, constraint setup, and data source/delegate assignment are all in viewDidLoad — NOT in viewIsAppearing or viewWillAppear

checklist.name: super called in all lifecycle overrides
checklist.description: Every overridden lifecycle method (viewDidLoad, viewIsAppearing, viewWillAppear, viewDidLayoutSubviews, etc.) calls super before or as part of its body

checklist.name: translatesAutoresizingMaskIntoConstraints = false
checklist.description: Every programmatically created view has translatesAutoresizingMaskIntoConstraints set to false before constraints are added

checklist.name: NSLayoutConstraint.activate used
checklist.description: Constraints are activated using NSLayoutConstraint.activate([...]) — NOT via individual constraint.isActive = true calls

checklist.name: Header constraint stored and reused
checklist.description: The collapsible header height (or equivalent) constraint is stored as a property and its .constant is modified to toggle states — the constraint is NOT removed and recreated

checklist.name: Animation uses layoutIfNeeded on superview
checklist.description: The expand/collapse animation calls layoutIfNeeded() inside a UIView.animate block on the superview (or view) — NOT by deactivating/reactivating constraints inside the animation block

checklist.name: Runtime priority ≤ 999
checklist.description: Any constraint whose priority is changed at runtime uses a value ≤ 999 (e.g., UILayoutPriority(999) or .defaultHigh) — NOT UILayoutPriority.required (1000)

checklist.name: Constraint identifiers set
checklist.description: At least one key constraint (e.g., the header height constraint or a major layout anchor) has its .identifier property set to a descriptive string

checklist.name: viewDidLayoutSubviews limited to layer work
checklist.description: If viewDidLayoutSubviews is overridden, it contains ONLY lightweight layer adjustments (e.g., cornerRadius, shadowPath) and does NOT set up constraints or subviews

checklist.name: No geometry work in viewWillAppear
checklist.description: viewWillAppear does NOT contain any geometry-dependent work such as scrolling, frame reading, or layout-dependent calculations
